name: charsel-content-y-inset
desc: Character-creation content Y inset for the native 1920x1080 lobby. Applies after charsel-recenter and charsel-content-inset, correcting the two remaining stale step-form anchors from Y=242 to the panel-aligned Y=280 so instruction text and form content sit inside the right panel.
verified: Live fc703 screenshots hud-spot-static-fc70-20260629 measured the right panel blue bbox at about y=293..808 while several create-step instruction glyphs rendered around y=276, above the frame. Static RE/decompile confirmed FUN_005989f0 and FUN_00595e70 still carried post-recenter Y=242 bytes, unlike the main panel/container anchors at Y=280. A title-only child rect patch fixed only one transition screen, so the durable fix is to align these stale content anchors with the panel anchor.

patches.note: FUN_005989f0 step-panel anchor Y 242 -> 280 (+38), post-charsel-recenter correction.
FUN_00595e70 faction radio/emblem panel anchor Y 242 -> 280 (+38), post-charsel-recenter correction.
